75036.subject: Defender discontinuation effective June 30 (ACTION REQUIRED)
75036.body:
This is a reminder that Defender will be permanently retired on July 1, 2026, approximately one week from now.

Dear Oleg,

This is a final reminder that the OpenZeppelin Defender platform will be permanently discontinued on June 30, 2026. After 23:59 UTC on that date, the Defender web application, its APIs, Relayers, Monitors and all associated hosted services will be shut down and permanently deleted. Please read this email carefully.

IF YOU DO NOT TAKE IMMEDIATE ACTION, YOU WILL PERMANENTLY LOSE ACCESS TO ANY INTEGRATIONS THAT MAY BE ASSOCIATED WITH YOUR DEFENDER ACCOUNT, INCLUDING RELATED GAS TOKENS, SMART CONTRACTS, OR OTHER DATA OR CONFIGURATIONS.

As less than one week now remains, we ask that you complete the actions described below before the discontinuation date to avoid disruption or loss.

What is happening

As we informed you in our prior notices dated June 30, 2025 and June 1, 2026, OpenZeppelin is discontinuing the Defender Services on June 30, 2026. Discontinuation of the Services (as defined in our Terms of Service available at openzeppelin.com/tos (https://cXwgv04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/LY+113/cXwgv04/VVwD882n0WS4W2Q2vFp512k1fW5SJqyG5QJhVtN7Y8_2z3lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3lRVFDsG01P_Wf-N14WrHFHxQYdW4W85-17z8L97W7TMxpZ7GRdwnW79XbSr3KRnbfW6HMNgp8PyWG1W4k772X64N4rgW4Cr20y12vkNRW1MQ5MG563y3vV-GG2Y66_3B9W8gWwCC7qLF1gW7f8Wj36svDSmW39Znyy39h7lhW7bWlwD85BsgtW6hLkv14WjMYGW5y1P4R8Y5L6GW8cfjhy31B3wrW8kcz6N4FSqSzW7sPcwL2KKQ1cN7_22wJt9cz6N7GMlPVM_K0gVXWL7W1wspQwf4xQHN204 ) ) will result in the permanent loss of your Service Inputs and Service Outputs, including, without limitation, Relayers, Monitors, Notifications, Actions/Autotasks, Sentinels, transaction proposals, address books, and any data, tokens, gas tokens, smart contracts, integrations and configurations stored in, or otherwise associated with, your Defender account.

You remain solely responsible for withdrawing any tokens in, and for managing access to, any smart contracts or blockchain accounts you have integrated with Defender, including gas tokens associated with a Relayer that was created by you using your Defender account. OpenZeppelin cannot manage, withdraw, or recover any such tokens, smart contracts, or other integrations on your behalf.

If you do not take action prior to June 30, 2026 access will be permanently lost.

Open source migration path

This migration guide (https://cXwgv04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/LY+113/cXwgv04/VVwD882n0WS4W2Q2vFp512k1fW5SJqyG5QJhVtN7Y8_2T3lcq-W7lCdLW6lZ3mQW3PDBf935P9jPN18sXgk8GpwfW40LZCB2JqMFpW2GGqt44Ksj-_W5MNnrm1W_MsgW4xtp-R54HzBWW1zBWGG7WMFmWW2YRzbh14KZl8W5PSdYz7n9pC-VyqSYC4g2gkkW6Tt0kc7wgsZZW3BJN1J7tVLSMW67TVsb659cJNW1CNT-J2WKLznW6RrzPw25y1yGW53ZZsR8R2ZQdW5zV8411G12QRW4wvJ3q2P4lWMN5Sn9zDG1qzWW7ySNdb2qY5_tW7z7D0l6-BBrnW31T1cR4dVVc6W8n_ZtB1QNFLPN5zzkNqzZfy7f7YjpSg04 ) covers everything you need to move to our open-source tools (Monitor and Relayer): one-click config export from the Defender UI, step-by-step video walkthroughs,

75035.subject: 🟪 America’s check-cashing tax
75035.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9f199753-ca31-4e3d-9435-5e12896ecff5/BD_NL_Banner_Heading.png?t=1781793903)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e60d7cde-4250-41f8-9443-28ed51b80560/divider_transparent.png?t=1774649182)
Caption: 

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/3bd8a492-ff61-41db-a7f2-c821d481fd72/BD_NL_QuoteCircle.png?t=1781794162)
Caption: 

“Everything is better in Japan.”
_— __Me_



----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/086c277d-7686-4f2e-9fa4-8d7b2901f63d/image.png?t=1782337854)
Caption: 

# America’s check-cashing tax

In Japan, real-time bank transfers have been the norm since the Zengin payments system launched in 1973: deposit a paycheck, withdraw your money.

In the US, that might take three days. 

In 2026.

This is not a technology issue. Zengin is a hub-and-spoke network of mainframe computers connected by old-school telecom lines. The fact this sufficed for real-time transfers — before the internet! — shows that where there’s a will, there’s a way.

In the US, there’s been no will.

Not among the regulators responsible for making it happen, at least. Economist Aaron Klein [argues](https://www.mercatus.org/macro-musings/aaron-klein-uss-real-time-payments-problem-and-impact-covid-era-quantitative-easing) that the US remains saddled with an antiquated payments system “b==ecause the Federal Reserve is in the pocket of the banks and credit unions that charge overdraft, and because they don’t care.”==

Klein goes so far as to accuse the Fed of flouting the law: “==The Federal Reserve, who is supposed to regulate our payment system, has ignored the Expedited Funds Availability Act, which requires them to move money as fast as technology allows.”==

==That might be an expansive interpretation of the EFAA — “as fast as technology allows” does not appear in either the ==[text of the law](https://www.govinfo.gov/app/details/COMPS-10571)== or its ==[implementation](https://www.fdic.gov/consumer-compliance-examination-manual/vi-1-expedited-funds-availability-act)==.==

==But the Act does instruct the Fed to limit the amount of time banks hold deposited funds to "as short a time as possible.” ==

==And the spirit of the law is clearly that payments should be modernized so that people get access to their money faster. ==

==Klein makes a convincing case that the Fed has moved far slower on this than it could have — perhaps to the point of negligence. ==

==Either way, the result is that US consumers have racked up billions of dollars in fees cashing their paychecks with check cashers.==

Surprisingly, it’s no

75034.subject: The Global 2000: AI Has Rewritten The World’s Corporate Scoreboard
75034.body:
Forbes P.M.

Автор: Forbes


Автор: Forbes

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/global-2000-ai-has-rewritten-worlds-corporate-scoreboard-9bsrc?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BPSnr8%2BUxQNOH%2F%2BYTvMsXSA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1G8uHjN8W8hsk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqskuofp~u0-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqskuofp-u0
  
Good evening, The Global 2000, Forbes’ annual ranking of the world’s largest public companies based on sales, profits, assets and market value, tells the story of globalization’s steady march. Year after year, the world’s largest corporations have largely sold more goods, earned more money and built more market value. In 2026, despite Trump’s trade war and rising prices, the global growth story is intact. While the list is still dominated by banks, this year’s movement was driven by AI. Here’s who made the list. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Getty Images Elon Musk Is No Longer A Trillionaire For now, Musk will have to settle for being the richest billionaire on Earth. Mandel Ngan/AFP via Getty Images The World’s Largest Tech Companies: Memory Chips Skyrocket Amid AI Data Center Buildout Amid the AI boom, memory chip manufacturing is a sizzling hot growth sector.

75033.subject: The Daily Degen - June 24th, 2026
75033.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-june-24th-2026

Happy Wednesday good degens! Lots of stuff going on!
Let’s get after it!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.184T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $710.60
Gold: $3,996.30
Silver: $57.27
Oil (WTI): $69.85
US 10Y Treasury: 4.396%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 18
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
Tons of cool stuff happening with @maplefinance [ https://substack.com/redirect/2ccf0d8e-da5c-4e35-ac8b-86d2f9af3a62?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] good frogs!
They are currently the 11th largest defi protocol by TVL, and have been growing like crazy on the back of all sorts of cool new partnerships! (such as their recent launch on Tempo - click here [ https://substack.com/redirect/616548c8-3a1d-48bf-9eb7-a0cb4f14d296?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] to learn more!)
In addition, they just released…
One - Some key updates to the borrower hub! and…
Two - The introduction of the Maple Transparency Page! [ https://substack.com/redirect/20ea26ab-69bb-4908-9133-6500d5fb657d?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]
Regarding the latter:
“Transparency isn’t a feature of onchain capital - it’s the entire point. 
We’re often asked for the same data from the Maple community: How big is each product? How much are people actually depositing? Is Maple making money? 
Now you can verify everything, anytime: https://maple.finance/transparency [ https://substack.com/redirect/1a9fe3e5-7a9e-4f08-8712-1e237d1f8100?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 
Next up: a full transparency hub with token metrics, product-level deep-dives, and proof of reserves.”
Learn more in the embedded tweet below, make sure to follow Maple on Twitter [ https://substack.com/redirect/2ccf0d8e-da5c-4e35-ac8b-86d2f9af3a62?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for more updates, and stay tuned as we continue bringing attention to everything they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mixed today. Fastest-growing chains on the weekly with at least $10M TVL are Immutable zkEVM, Pharos, and Citrea.
Protocols are also mixed today. Fastest-growing protocols on the weekly with at least $10M TVL are multichain payments protocol LlamaPay, Rollus/Fushion dex Chainge Finance, and uncategorized Solana protocol Solayer.

75032.subject: Reminder: Please Withdraw Your NFTs Before 3 July 2026
75032.body: #outlook a { padding:0; } body { margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;-ms-text-size-adjust:100%; } table, td { border-collapse:collapse;mso-table-lspace:0pt;mso-table-rspace:0pt; } img { border:0;height:auto;line-height:100%; outline:none;text-decoration:none;-ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic; } p { display:block;margin:13px 0; } 96 .mj-outlook-group-fix { width:100% !important; } @media only screen and (min-width:480px) { .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; }.mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; }.moz-text-html .mj-column-per-50 { width:50% !important; max-width: 50%; } @media only screen and (max-width:480px) { table.mj-full-width-mobile { width: 100% !important; } td.mj-full-width-mobile { width: auto !important; } } :root { color-scheme: light !important; supported-color-schemes: light !important; } @media only screen and (min-width:480px) { .hidden-desktop { display: none !important; } body.gjs-dashed .hidden-desktop { display: block !important; } div.mj-group-full-width { width: 100% !important; max-width: 100% !important; } } @media only screen and (max-width:480px) { .hidden-mobile { display: none !important; } body.gjs-dashed .hidden-mobile { display: block !important; } } Dear Binancian, Reminder: Please Withdraw Your NFTs Before 3 July 2026 We previously announced we are upgrading the Binance NFT service to be made available on Binance Wallet.  Starting 2026-06-03 , users holding transferable NFTs on Binance will have one-month to withdraw their NFTs to their Binance Wallet or any other compatible wallets of their choice to continue managing their digital assets. This is a reminder to withdraw your transferable NFTs before 2026-07-03 . After that date, users will no longer access support for the current NFT service on Binance Exchange and any NFTs not withdrawn by then will no longer be accessible. CR7 NFT Withdrawal Fee Reimbursement Users who withdraw CR7 NFTs from the Binance NFT platform to any supported wallets by 2026-07-03 23:59 (UTC) are eligible to receive reimbursement. The withdrawal fees will be credited to eligible users’ Binance Spot Accounts by 2026-07-19 . To qualify, users must: Withdraw CR7 NFTs directly from the Binance NFT platform to any supported wallets; Complete the withdrawal on BNB Smart Chain between 2026-06-03 00:00 (UTC) and 2 026-07-03 23:59 (UTC) ; and Have held the NFT(s) on the Binance NFT platform before 2026-06-03 00:00 (UTC) . Please Note:  Only successful withdrawal transactions will qualify for reimbursement. Binance reserves the right to disqualify any user from reimbursement eligibility due to fraudulent or abusive behavior. There may be discrepancies between this original content in English and any translated versions. Please refer to the original English version for the most accurate information, in case any discrepancies arise. Should you have any ques
